positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a howling wolf silhouette sitting within a perfectly centered crescent moon. The wolf and moon should be rendered in a deep indigo and striking ethereal gold color palette. Use negative space effectively, ensuring clean, sharp lines suitable for direct-to-garment printing. The composition should be symmetrical and highly graphic, evoking a magical night forest setting. Style should be modern tattoo flash art combined with celestial geometry, emphasizing bold silhouettes and high contrast. Cinematic, high detail, vector art quality.
